title: docs/product/index.json — schema v1.1
description: Machine-owned manifest generated from docs/product/ROADMAP.md and docs/product/features/<###>-<slug>/feature.md, plus (v1.1, optional) docs/product/VISION.md and docs/product/audits/<date>-<focus>.md. See docs/product/SCHEMA.md section 3 for the authoritative prose contract; field names here are identical. `vision`/`audits` are OPTIONAL properties (not in `required`) so a v1-only document (no VISION.md, no audits/) that omits them entirely still validates (FR-016) — when present, they follow the shapes in $defs/vision and $defs/audit.

schema_version.description: Schema version of this manifest. Current: 1.

generated.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this file was generated.

id.description: Kebab-case project identifier, matches ROADMAP.md frontmatter `project`.

next.description: Recommended next feature id, or null. References a features[].id.

cursor.description: Pagination/resume cursor for consumers walking the feature list incrementally. Same id space as `next`, may differ from it. Null when there is nothing to resume.

vision.description: v1.1, OPTIONAL: null when docs/product/VISION.md is absent; otherwise mirrors its frontmatter (FR-014). Absent entirely from a strict v1-only document is also valid (this property is not in `required`).

audits.description: v1.1, OPTIONAL: one entry per docs/product/audits/<date>-<focus>.md file, [] when none exist (FR-015). Absent entirely from a strict v1-only document is also valid (this property is not in `required`).

target.description: Target month YYYY-MM, or null if unscheduled.

milestone.description: Must reference a milestones[].id in this same document.

stage.description: Lifecycle stage while in-flight; null when not in-flight. Reuses CODE_SCOPE_STAGES (_shared/a1-tools.cjs).

depends_on.description: Array of feature ids this feature depends on.

started.description: Date work began, YYYY-MM-DD, or null.

finished.description: Date work completed, YYYY-MM-DD, or null.

spec_path.description: Repo-relative path to the feature's spec doc, or null.

plan_path.description: Repo-relative path to the feature's wave-plan doc, or null.

vision.description: v1.1: null when docs/product/VISION.md is absent (FR-014).

audit.description: v1.1: one entry per docs/product/audits/<date>-<focus>.md file (FR-015).

path.description: Repo-relative path to the audit file, e.g. "docs/product/audits/2026-07-13-general.md".

counts.description: Mirrors the audit's frontmatter `counts` (blocker/major/minor, all findings regardless of status).

open.description: Derived: count of findings[] with status "open".

fixed.description: Derived: count of findings[] with status "fixed". Findings with status "obsolete"/"accepted" count toward neither open nor fixed.
